title: About
text:
I am a biostatistics researcher interested in healthcare analytics, epidemiology, and predictive modeling.
My work focuses on applying statistical and machine learning methods to improve healthcare outcomes and public health decision-making.



Healthcare Data Science
Epidemiology
Machine Learning
Statistical Modeling
Public Health Analytics




I aim to contribute to impactful healthcare research by combining statistics, machine learning, and real-world data analysis.

title: Olawale Olaniyan
text:
I use statistical modeling, machine learning, and epidemiological analysis to solve healthcare and public health problems.
View Projects GitHub




I am passionate about using data science and statistical methods to solve healthcare and public health challenges.
My interests include: - Machine Learning - Biostatistics - Epidemiology - Predictive Modeling - Healthcare Analytics






Built machine learning models to predict cardiovascular disease risk using clinical data.
Tools: Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas




Analyzed behavioral and physiological data to identify stress indicators.
